headline: Is KKR's (KKR) Samsung SDS Deal Quietly Rewiring Its Tech Exposure and Earnings Mix?
summary: In recent days, KKR-backed funds agreed to purchase KRW 1.22 trillion (about US$820 million) in newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, forming a partnership focused on AI transformation services, infrastructure, and global expansion support. KKR also completed the final close of its approximately US$23.00 billion North America Fund XIV, underscoring its growing role as a capital allocator across private markets and technology-enabled businesses. Next, we’ll examine how KKR’s...
